topStories.description: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday (local time) said that China is very happy that the Strait of Hormuz is being opened permanently, adding that his Chinese counterpart, Xi Jinping, will give him a ‘big, fat hug’ during his upcoming visit to China.

topStories.title: South Africa names apartheid-era politician as new ambassador to the US
topStories.description: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.

topStories.title: Saudi Arabia-hosted Asian Cup draw rescheduled due to US-Israel war on Iran
topStories.description: Draw for the 24-team 2027 AFC Asian Cup, originally set for Saturday, moved to May 9.

dailyNews.description: Autos featuring President of the United States Donald Trump and iconic American images will be rolled out across New Delhi to mark 250 years of US freedom.

dailyNews.title: US-Iran talks: What’s the latest on mediation efforts?
dailyNews.description: Tehran rejects US conditions on nuclear arms; sanctions relief and strait control fuel diplomatic deadlock in Islamabad.

dailyNews.title: Iran Threatens To Block Gulf, Red Sea Trade Routes If US Naval Blockade Persists
dailyNews.description: The arterial route for East-West trade could be choked if Yemen's Houthi rebels, aligned with Iran, block the Bab al-Mandab Strait.

dailyNews.title: What are Iran’s $100bn in frozen assets and where are they held?
dailyNews.description: Iran wants the US to release its frozen assets as part of talks. The money could help it rebuild its battered economy.

dailyNews.title: Jennie Garth admits ‘I wasn’t in my right mind’ after daughter witnessed disturbing scene
dailyNews.description: Jennie Garth opens up in her new memoir about her daughter finding her cutting herself with broken glass, a moment she says will stay with her forever.

dailyNews.title: Doctor warns wearable fitness trackers can backfire, despite Rory McIlroy's success
dailyNews.description: Rory McIlroy tracked his heart rate during his Masters victory using a wearable device, sparking debate over whether health trackers help or harm users.

dailyNews.title: Johnson faces GOP revolt over warrantless surveillance powers ahead of key vote
dailyNews.description: Speaker Mike Johnson faces GOP pushback on renewing FISA Section 702 warrantless surveillance powers as conservatives demand additional reform guardrails.

dailyNews.title: From White House hopeful to scandal: Swalwell’s short-lived 2020 bid resurfaces after resignation
dailyNews.description: Swalwell's political collapse came seven years after his unsuccessful 2020 presidential bid, ending with his resignation from Congress amid allegations.

dailyNews.title: Chinese researcher on US visa pleads guilty to smuggling E. coli into the country
dailyNews.description: A Chinese researcher was sentenced to over four months in prison after pleading guilty to smuggling concealed E. coli DNA into the United States.

dailyNews.title: John Solomon predicts Brennan indictment could come within 'weeks' as prosecutors request official transcripts
dailyNews.description: Former CIA Director John Brennan could face an indictment decision in weeks, says John Solomon, citing a rare prosecutorial request for Senate transcripts.

dailyNews.title: Russia's Lavrov says Iran has 'inalienable' right to enrich uranium, openly defying Trump's demands
dailyNews.description: Russia's Sergey Lavrov says Iran has an inalienable right to enrich uranium for civilian purposes, pushing back against Trump's nuclear demands.

dailyNews.title: NHL coach rips players after stunning late-season collapse extends playoff drought: 'They don’t care'
dailyNews.description: Blue Jackets coach Rick Bowness ripped his team after a stunning collapse ended in a sixth consecutive season without a playoff berth. He vowed culture changes are ahead.

dailyNews.title: Gavin Newsom sets August 2026 special election to fill Eric Swalwell's vacant congressional seat
dailyNews.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom sets August 2026 special election after Rep. Eric Swalwell resigned from Congress amid calls to step down.

dailyNews.title: Federal judge hands Biden's home state a loss in battle of ICE access to labor data
dailyNews.description: A federal judge ordered Delaware officials to turn over confidential employer and employee records to ICE in an immigration enforcement legal dispute.

dailyNews.title: Vance anti-fraud task force suspends 447 hospices in Los Angeles over more than $600M in suspected fraud
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance's anti-fraud task force suspends 447 hospices and 23 home health agencies in Los Angeles amid suspected fraud exceeding $600 million.

dailyNews.title: Roblox adds age-based accounts for kids and teens
dailyNews.description: Roblox is rolling out Kids and Select account types in early June, building separate environments for different age groups with built-in safety controls.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Iran War is 'Close to Over' as Blockade Continues
dailyNews.description: United States Central Command says the American blockade of Iranian ports in and around the Strait of Hormuz is now “fully implemented” as President Donald Trump indicates that a new round of ceasefire talks to end the war could begin by the end of the week. Trump also said that the war’s aims are already mainly accomplished, saying, “I view it as very close to over.” NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: Tankers, talks and Trump's 'dangerous' blockade: China's Iran war involvement gets louder
dailyNews.description: BEIJING — China has been a quiet — if crucial — player in the Iran war, as U.S. military action upends the global economy

dailyNews.description: Trump says Iran wants 'to make a deal very badly'

dailyNews.description: Trump claims new Iran talks starting soon amid blockade

dailyNews.title: White House holds press briefing
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt holds a press briefing.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran war "close to over" amid push for new peace talks
dailyNews.description: With the Iran war paused halfway through a 2-week ceasefire, President Trump is again voicing optimism over the potential for a deal to end it for good.

dailyNews.title: Trump insists the Iran war is almost over
dailyNews.description: President Trump says more talks with Iran could occur in the coming days as questions linger about how effective his blockade is at the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Weijia Jiang reports, and Captain Raman Kapoor comments on his ship stranded in the Persian Gulf since February.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to fire Powell if the Fed chair doesn't leave office on his own
dailyNews.description: Though most Fed chairs in the past have left after being replaced, Powell has demurred on what he plans to do.

dailyNews.title: Trump accounts sign up 5 million kids, with 1.2 million eligible for $1,000 seed money, Bessent says
dailyNews.description: Trump accounts have signed up 5 million kids, according to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent. Here's what families need to know.

dailyNews.title: Iran war 'very close to over,' Trump says — and the stock market 'is going to boom'
dailyNews.description: The U.S. has beaten Iran "militarily" and that the war is "very close to over," Trump said, claiming a peace deal likely.

dailyNews.title: Top Energy Democrat probes Trump administration's preparations for Strait of Hormuz closure
dailyNews.description: The strait has been effectively closed since the U.S. launched a war with Iran, spiking energy prices and whipsawing markets.

dailyNews.title: United CEO had been considering a merger last fall, months before bringing it up to the Trump administration
dailyNews.description: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby has said the next phase for U.S. carriers is figuring out how to better compete on a global stage.
